normalization_notes: sRGB frames converted to normalized RGB in [0,1]
deterministic block-matching proxy in pixel offsets to the previous frame; derived-low-confidence
segmentation-guided relative-depth proxy in [0,1]; derived-low-confidence and explicitly non-metric
normals derived from the relative-depth proxy; derived-low-confidence
notes: ROI comes from the official DAVIS annotation after unioning non-zero object ids.
Motion vectors use deterministic block matching on adjacent frames and remain derived-low-confidence.
Depth is a segmentation-guided relative-depth proxy, not metric depth.
Normals are derived from the relative-depth proxy.
